programmes.show_description: Every weekday night on Court TV, Vinnie Politan takes a deep dive into the True Crime stories that are captivating the nation. Now, you can catch the sharp analysis and insightful interviews.
The Matriarch Mastermind Murder. More than a decade after Florida State Law professor Dan Markel was gunned down by two Miami hitmen, his former mother-in-law, Donna Adelson, is accused.
Murdaugh Family Murders. Victim to Verdict with Ted Rowlands takes you inside the high-stakes trials that have captivated the true crime world. Hosted by Court TV's Ted Rowlands.

A murder trial pits brother against brother. When Harry Beck becomes the star witness for prosecutors, will he be able to testify that his brother is guilty of killing his girlfriend?
For the first time, convicted murderer, Andrew Wirth, sits down for an interview about the night that changed his life, and the tangled series of events that led to him killing a police officer.
Frank Jude was nearly beaten to death by a group of drunk, off-duty police officers. But his real fight would be in the courtroom, taking on the Blue Wall of Silence in his quest for justice.
Did a wife frame her husband for murder... from beyond the grave?  Julie Jensen believed her husband wanted her dead, but will a jury convict a widower based on the victim's own words?
